description_long: This is a modern rectangular cabinet or shelf with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, light gray top surface and two side supports. One side panel is solid, while the other incorporates a unique crisscross wooden structure that functions as an open shelf, currently holding several books. The crisscross shelf is made of light wood and forms an X-shaped compartment, adding both structural interest and storage functionality. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas. The open shelf design allows for easy access to stored items and visual display, while the solid top can support additional objects or serve as a workspace.
description: A modern rectangular cabinet or shelf with a light gray top and a crisscross wooden side shelf holding books. Its minimalist design combines solid and open elements for both storage and display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid gray top, the left wooden crisscross shelf with visible books, and the right solid support.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid gray end panel, with no visible shelving or contents.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the open crisscross shelf on the right and the solid support on the left.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the wooden crisscross shelf filled with books, with the solid gray top above.
